seo.title: Kapwing Alternative for Lyric Videos — AI-Powered, Free
seo.description: Need a Kapwing alternative for lyric videos? Start from audio, auto-sync lyrics to the beat, generate visuals, and export without timeline editing.

hero.badge: Kapwing alternative — AI lyric video maker, free
hero.subhead: Kapwing is a general video editor — making lyric videos in it means typing lyrics, dragging text, and timing every line by hand. LyricVideoMaker is built for lyric videos: upload your song, AI transcribes and syncs the lyrics, preview, and export — free, no subscription needed.

trust: Export free, no subscription or credit card

comparisonTable.title: Kapwing vs LyricVideoMaker for Lyric Videos
comparisonTable.description: Kapwing is useful for general editing. LyricVideoMaker is built around the lyric video workflow: song in, synced lyric video out.

rows.label: Primary job
values: AI lyric video generator for songs, lyrics, beat sync, and music visuals
General-purpose browser video editor for many video formats

rows.label: Lyric transcription
values: AI transcribes lyrics from audio automatically
Lyric-video work usually starts with your own text and manual placement

rows.label: Timing workflow

rows.label: When Kapwing is better
values: Use LyricVideoMaker when the project is mainly a lyric video

comparisonTable.note: The fair comparison is specialization versus flexibility: Kapwing is broader, while LyricVideoMaker removes the lyric-video chores.

howItWorks.title: How This Kapwing Alternative Makes Lyric Videos

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. Unlike Kapwing, you don't need to place text on a timeline — the AI handles everything from audio.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. No more dragging text layers or guessing timestamps like you would in Kapwing.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Make Lyric Videos on LyricVideoMaker Instead of a General Editor
whyChoose.description: Kapwing is a great general editor, but making lyric videos in it means doing all the hard work yourself — typing lyrics, timing each line, placing text. LyricVideoMaker automates the painful parts: transcription, beat sync, and visual generation.

highlight.title: Built for lyric videos, not general editing
highlight.description: LyricVideoMaker does one thing well: turn a song into a lyric video. Upload audio, get beat-synced lyrics with AI visuals, preview, and export. No timeline, no text layers, no manual timing.

cards.title: No blank timeline setup
cards.description: The project starts from your song instead of a blank canvas, so the lyric video structure is already pointed in the right direction.

cards.title: Less manual text placement
cards.description: LyricVideoMaker prepares the lyrics and timing before you review, so editing is about correction instead of building every line by hand.

cards.title: Music visuals stay central
cards.description: The generated look is driven by the track's mood, not by treating the song as another generic clip in a multipurpose editor.

items.question: Is LyricVideoMaker free as a Kapwing alternative?
items.answer: Yes. As a Kapwing alternative, LyricVideoMaker is free — start with free credits and export your lyric video, no subscription or card required.

items.question: How is LyricVideoMaker different from Kapwing for lyric videos?
items.answer: Kapwing is a general video editor — you type lyrics and place them on a timeline. LyricVideoMaker auto-transcribes lyrics from audio, syncs to the beat, generates AI visuals, and exports a finished lyric video.

items.question: Do I need to type lyrics like in Kapwing?
items.answer: No. Instead of typing lyrics onto a timeline like in Kapwing, AI transcribes them from your audio in 50+ languages. Edit any line if needed.

items.question: When should I still use Kapwing?
items.answer: Kapwing is better for general video editing — podcast clips, memes, subtitle edits, or mixed-media projects. For lyric videos specifically, LyricVideoMaker is faster and more specialized.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes. Your exports are yours for monetized channels and paid releases, no different from Kapwing. Just make sure you have the rights to the music you upload.

items.question: How hard is it to switch from Kapwing?
items.answer: There's nothing to migrate. Upload the same song you used in Kapwing and you'll have a finished lyric video in a couple of minutes — no project files to move, no setup.
